methods.name: Add()
methods.summary: Adds a new layer with default definition to the layer table.

returns.doc: index of new layer.

methods.name: Add(Layer)
methods.summary: Adds a new layer with specified definition to the layer table.

params.name: layer
params.doc: definition of new layer. The information in layer is copied. If layer.Name is empty the a unique name of the form "Layer 01" will be automatically created.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new layer -1 layer not added because a layer with that name already exists.

methods.name: Add(String, Color)
methods.signature: public int Add(string layerName, Color layerColor)
methods.summary: Adds a new layer with specified definition to the layer table.

params.name: layerName
params.doc: Name for new layer. Cannot be a null or zero-length string.

params.name: layerColor
params.doc: Color of new layer. Alpha components will be ignored.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new layer -1 layer not added because a layer with that name already exists.

methods.name: AddPath(String)
methods.summary: Adds all of the layer in the specified layer path, beginning with the root. Layer paths contain one or more valid layers names, with each name separated by NamePathSeparator. For example, "Grandfather::Father::Son".

params.name: layerPath
params.doc: The layer path.

returns.doc: The index of the last layer created if successful, UnsetIntIndex on failure.

methods.name: AddPath(String, Color)
methods.signature: public int AddPath(string layerPath, Color layerColor)
methods.summary: Adds all of the layer in the specified layer path, beginning with the root. Layer paths contain one or more valid layers names, with each name separated by NamePathSeparator. For example, "Grandfather::Father::Son".

params.name: layerPath
params.doc: The layer path.

params.name: layerColor
params.doc: The color of newly created layers. The colors of layers that already exist will not be changed.

returns.doc: The index of the last layer created if successful, UnsetIntIndex on failure.

methods.name: AddReferenceLayer()
methods.summary: Adds a new reference layer with default definition to the layer table. Reference layers are not saved in files.

returns.doc: index of new layer.

methods.name: AddReferenceLayer(Layer)
methods.summary: Adds a new reference layer with specified definition to the layer table Reference layers are not saved in files.

params.name: layer
params.doc: definition of new layer. The information in layer is copied. If layer.Name is empty the a unique name of the form "Layer 01" will be automatically created.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new layer -1 layer not added because a layer with that name already exists.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Marks all items as deleted.

methods.name: CreateLayer
methods.signature: public int CreateLayer(Layer newLayer, LayerTable.LayerType layerType, uint worksessionReferenceModelSerialNumber, uint linkedInstanceDefinitionSerialNumber)
methods.summary: Basic tool used by the add layer methods.

params.name: newLayer
params.doc: Settings for new layer. These are copied to the layer table entry and any user data on layer is moved to the layer table entry.

params.name: layerType
params.doc: Type type of layer to create.

params.name: worksessionReferenceModelSerialNumber
params.doc: Worksession reference model serial number, where: 0: Layer is not a reference layer. 1: Layer is a reference layer but not part of a worksession reference file. 2-1000: Reserved for future use. >1000: Worksession reference model serial number.

params.name: linkedInstanceDefinitionSerialNumber
params.doc: Linked instance definition serial number, where: 0: Layer is not from a liked instance definition. 1-1000: Reserved for future use. >1000: Linked instance definition serial number.

returns.doc: The index of the last layer created if successful, UnsetIntIndex on failure.

methods.name: Delete(Layer)
methods.summary: Deletes layer.

params.name: layer
params.doc: Layer to be deleted.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or because it layer contains active geometry.

methods.name: Delete(Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Delete(Guid layerId, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes layer.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: Id of the layer to be deleted.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message box appears if a layer the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or it contains active geometry.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or because it layer contains active geometry.

methods.name: Delete(IEnumerable<Int32>, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int Delete(IEnumerable<int> layerIndices, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes layers.

params.name: layerIndices
params.doc: An enumeration containing the indices of the layers to delete.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message boxes will appear.

returns.doc: the number of layers that were deleted.

methods.name: Delete(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Delete(int layerIndex, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes layer.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: zero based index of layer to delete. This must be in the range 0 <= layerIndex < LayerTable.Count.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message box appears if a layer the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or it contains active geometry.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or because it layer contains active geometry.

methods.name: Delete(Layer, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Delete(Layer layer, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes layer.

params.name: layer
params.doc: Layer to be deleted.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message box appears if a layer the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or it contains active geometry.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer or because it layer contains active geometry.

methods.name: Duplicate(IEnumerable<Int32>, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int[] Duplicate(IEnumerable<int> layerIndices, bool duplicateObjects, bool duplicateSublayers)
methods.summary: Duplicates, or copies, one or more layers. Duplicated layers are added to the document.

params.name: layerIndices
params.doc: The indices of layers to duplicate.

params.name: duplicateObjects
params.doc: If true, then layer objects will also be duplicated and added to the document.

params.name: duplicateSublayers
params.doc: If true, then all sub-layers of the layer will be duplicated.

returns.doc: The indices of the newly added layers if successful, an empty array on failure.

methods.name: Duplicate(Int32, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int[] Duplicate(int layerIndex, bool duplicateObjects, bool duplicateSublayers)
methods.summary: Duplicates, or copies, a layer. Duplicated layers are added to the document.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: The index of the layer to duplicate.

params.name: duplicateObjects
params.doc: If true, then layer objects will also be duplicated and added to the document.

params.name: duplicateSublayers
params.doc: If true, then all sub-layers of the layer will be duplicated.

returns.doc: The indices of the newly added layers if successful, an empty array on failure.

methods.name: FindByFullPath
methods.signature: public int FindByFullPath(string layerPath, int notFoundReturnValue)
methods.summary: Searches for a layer using the fully qualified name, that includes ancestors. Deleted layers have no name.

params.name: layerPath
params.doc: The full layer name.

params.name: notFoundReturnValue
params.doc: Should be -1 to get the index of the OpenNURBS default layer, or UnsetIntIndex to get an always-out-of-bound value.

returns.doc: The index of the found layer, or notFoundReturnValue.

methods.name: FindId
methods.summary: Uses the guid to find a model component. Deleted objects cannot be found by id. The guid is the value that is stored in the .Id property. In a single document, no two active objects have the same guid. If an object is replaced with a new object, then the guid persists. For example, if the _Move command moves an object, then the moved object inherits its guid from the starting object. If the Copy command copies an object, then the copy gets a new guid. This guid persists through file saving/opening operations. This function will not find grip objects.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of model component to search for.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object with the objectId or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindIndex
methods.summary: Retrieves a Layer object based on Index. This search type of search is discouraged. We are moving towards using only IDs for all tables.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index to search for.

returns.doc: A Layer object, or null if none was found.

methods.name: FindName(String)
methods.summary: Finds the layer with a given name. If multiple layers exist that have the same name, the first match layer index will be returned. Deleted layers have no name.The default layer is NOT included in the search. If required, use the overload with startIndex input.

params.name: layerName
params.doc: name of layer to search for. The search ignores case.

returns.doc: A layer, or null.

methods.name: FindName(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public Layer FindName(string layerName, int startIndex)
methods.summary: Finds the next layer that has an index equal or higher than the searched value. Search in case-insensitive.

params.name: layerName
params.doc: The layer to search for.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: If you specify RhinoMath.UnsetIntIndex, then also default layers will be included. This is the first index that will be tested.

returns.doc: A layer, or null.

methods.name: FindNameHash
methods.summary: Finds a Layer given its name hash.

params.name: nameHash
params.doc: The name hash of the Layer to be searched.

returns.doc: An Layer, or null on error.

methods.name: ForceLayerVisible(Guid)
methods.summary: Makes a layer and all of its parent layers visible.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: The layer ID to be made visible.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded.

methods.name: ForceLayerVisible(Int32)
methods.summary: Makes a layer and all of its parent layers visible.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: The layer index to be made visible.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: (Overrides CommonComponentTable<T>.GetEnumerator().)

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Tables.LayerTable.GetEnumerator"]

methods.name: GetSelected
methods.summary: Returns the indices of layers that are selected on the Layer user interface.

params.name: layerIndices
params.doc: The indices of selected layers.

returns.doc: true if the layer user interface is visible, false otherwise.

methods.name: GetSorted
methods.summary: Gets an array of layer indices that are sorted by the values of SortIndex.

returns.doc: An array of layer indices.

methods.name: GetUnusedLayerName()
methods.summary: Gets the next unused layer name used as default when creating new layers.

returns.doc: An unused layer name string.

methods.name: GetUnusedLayerName(Boolean)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("'ignoreDeleted' is now redundant. Layers are now permanently removed. Use the overload with this argument.")] public string GetUnusedLayerName(bool ignoreDeleted)
methods.summary: Gets the next unused layer name used as default when creating new layers.

params.name: ignoreDeleted
params.doc: If this is true then Rhino may use a name used by a deleted layer.

returns.doc: An unused layer name string.

methods.name: Modify(Layer, Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Modify(Layer newSettings, Guid layerId, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Modifies layer settings.

params.name: newSettings
params.doc: This information is copied.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: Id of layer.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: if false, information message boxes pop up when illegal changes are attempted.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the settings attempt to lock or hide the current layer.

methods.name: Modify(Layer, Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Modify(Layer newSettings, int layerIndex, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Modifies layer settings.

params.name: newSettings
params.doc: This information is copied.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: zero based index of layer to set. This must be in the range 0 <= layerIndex < LayerTable.Count.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: if false, information message boxes pop up when illegal changes are attempted.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the settings attempt to lock or hide the current layer.

methods.name: Purge(Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Purge(Guid layerId, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes a layer and all geometry objects on a layer.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: Id of the layer to purge.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message box appears if a layer the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer.

methods.name: Purge(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Purge(int layerIndex, bool quiet)
methods.summary: Deletes a layer and all geometry objects on a layer

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: zero based index of layer to delete. This must be in the range 0 <= layerIndex < LayerTable.Count.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: If true, no warning message box appears if a layer the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer.

returns.doc: true if successful. false if layerIndex is out of range or the layer cannot be deleted because it is the current layer.

methods.name: Select
methods.signature: public bool Select(IEnumerable<int> layerIndices, bool bDeselect)
methods.summary: Selects layers in the Layer user interface.

params.name: layerIndices
params.doc: The indices of layers to select.

params.name: bDeselect
params.doc: If true, then any previously selected layers will be unselected.

returns.doc: true if the layer user interface is visible, false otherwise.

methods.name: SetCurrentLayerIndex
methods.signature: public bool SetCurrentLayerIndex(int layerIndex, bool quiet)
methods.summary: At all times, there is a "current" layer. Unless otherwise specified, new objects are assigned to the current layer. The current layer is never locked, hidden, or deleted.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: Value for new current layer. 0 <= layerIndex < LayerTable.Count. The layer's mode is automatically set to NormalMode.

params.name: quiet
params.doc: if true, then no warning message box pops up if the current layer request can't be satisfied.

returns.doc: true if current layer index successfully set.

methods.name: Sort
methods.summary: Updates the layer sort order

params.name: layerIndices
params.doc: The sort order.

methods.name: SortByLayerName
methods.summary: Sort layers, in the layer table, by their name in either ascending or descending order. This function sorts layers in the same manner as Rhino's Layers panel.
methods.remarks: This function changes the value of SortIndex. It does not change the index order of layers in the layer table.

params.name: bAscending
params.doc: Sort in ascending (true) or descending (false) order.

methods.name: Undelete
methods.summary: Undeletes a layer that has been deleted by DeleteLayer().

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: zero based index of layer to undelete. This must be in the range 0 <= layerIndex < LayerTable.Count.

returns.doc: true if successful.

methods.name: UndoModify(Guid)
methods.summary: Restores the layer to its previous state, if the layer has been modified and the modification can be undone.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: The layer Id to be used.

returns.doc: true if this layer had been modified and the modifications were undone.

methods.name: UndoModify(Int32)
methods.summary: Restores the layer to its previous state, if the layer has been modified and the modification can be undone.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: The layer index to be used.

returns.doc: true if this layer had been modified and the modifications were undone.

methods.name: UndoModify(Guid, UInt32)
methods.signature: public bool UndoModify(Guid layerId, uint undoRecordSerialNumber)
methods.summary: Restores the layer to its previous state, if the layer has been modified and the modification can be undone.

params.name: layerId
params.doc: The layer Id to be used.

params.name: undoRecordSerialNumber
params.doc: The undo record serial number. Pass 0 not to specify one.

returns.doc: true if this layer had been modified and the modifications were undone.

methods.name: UndoModify(Int32, UInt32)
methods.signature: public bool UndoModify(int layerIndex, uint undoRecordSerialNumber)
methods.summary: Restores the layer to its previous state, if the layer has been modified and the modification can be undone.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: The layer index to be used.

params.name: undoRecordSerialNumber
params.doc: The undo record serial number. Pass 0 not to specify one.

returns.doc: true if this layer had been modified and the modifications were undone.

properties.name: ActiveCount
properties.summary: Returns number of layers in the layer table, excluding deleted layers.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Returns number of layers in the layer table, including deleted layers.

properties.name: CurrentLayer
properties.summary: At all times, there is a "current" layer. Unless otherwise specified, new objects are assigned to the current layer. The current layer is never locked, hidden, or deleted. Returns reference to the current layer. Note that this reference may become invalid after a call to AddLayer().

properties.name: CurrentLayerIndex
properties.summary: At all times, there is a "current" layer. Unless otherwise specified, new objects are assigned to the current layer. The current layer is never locked, hidden, or deleted. Returns: Zero based layer table index of the current layer.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Conceptually, the layer table is an array of layers. The operator[] can be used to get individual layers. A layer is either active or deleted and this state is reported by Layer.IsDeleted.
